twitter_thread: 85% of Capcut Pro Studio users miss out on 30% faster editing times by not using AI-powered transitions.
Capcut Pro Studio's 'smart' editing mode cuts 4K HDR rendering time by 25%, from 2 hours to 1.5 hours.
Use Capcut Pro Studio's color grading to enhance production value: 60% of users see improved engagement with graded videos.
Overusing AI transitions in Capcut Pro Studio can make videos look amateurish, like this example: 5 transitions in 10 seconds.
Mastering Capcut Pro Studio's multi-camera editing takes 10 hours of practice, but reduces editing time by 40%.
Start with Capcut Pro Studio's 10-minute tutorial to avoid overwhelm and get familiar with its 20+ tools and features.
What's your experience with Capcut Pro Studio? Have you found any hidden gems or limitations in the software? #videoediting #capcut
